interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which states have an average math score for 8th grade students below 270 in 2017?
interactions.intention: Which states have an average math score for 8th grade students below 270 in 2017?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT STATE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_NDECOREEXCEL_MATH_GRADE8 WHERE YEAR = 2017 AND AVERAGE_SCALE_SCORE < 270

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total federal revenue for these states?
interactions.intention: What is the total federal revenue for the states retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SFFK.STATE, SUM(SFF.T_FED_REV) AS TOTAL_FED_REV FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17 SFF JOIN STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 SFFK ON SFF.STATE_CODE = SFFK.STATE_CODE WHERE SFFK.STATE IN (SELECT STATE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_NDECOREEXCEL_MATH_GRADE8 WHERE YEAR = 2017 AND AVERAGE_SCALE_SCORE < 270) GROUP BY SFFK.STATE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also provide the number of records for these states?
interactions.intention: Can you provide the number of records for the states retrieved in the previous interactions?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT STATE, RECORDS_CNT FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 WHERE STATE IN (SELECT STATE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_NDECOREEXCEL_MATH_GRADE8 WHERE YEAR = 2017 AND AVERAGE_SCALE_SCORE < 270)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which commodity has the maximum quantity in the sample data?
interactions.intention: Which commodity has the maximum quantity in the sample data?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COMMOD FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 WHERE QUANTITY = (SELECT MAX(QUANTITY) FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the origin of this commodity?
interactions.intention: What is the origin of the commodity retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ORIGIN FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 WHERE COMMOD = (SELECT COMMOD FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 WHERE QUANTITY = (SELECT MAX(QUANTITY) FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the pest codes associated with this commodity?
interactions.intention: What are the pest codes associated with the commodity retrieved in the previous interactions?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PESTCODE FROM PESTICIDE_RESULTSDATA15 WHERE COMMOD = (SELECT COMMOD FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 WHERE QUANTITY = (SELECT MAX(QUANTITY) FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15))

interactions.intention: What are the full names of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

interactions.utterance: Did any of these players win awards?
interactions.intention: Did any of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936 win awards?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD WHERE PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Which players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

interactions.intention: What are the full names of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H ON P.PLAYER_ID = H.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y';

interactions.intention: Did any of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936 ever win an award?
